channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Google Messages Chat Themes are Live – How to Get Them Now  Droid Life
  2. Google Messages starts rolling out custom ‘Chat themes’ [U]  9to5Google
  3. Google Messages finally unlocks a personalization perk iPhone users have been enjoying  PhoneArena
  4. Google Messages starts rolling out features that are common on iMessage and WhatsApp  Trusted Reviews
  5. Google News is getting a facelift. A feature users have been waiting for for years has arrived  Samsung Magazine

item.title: iOS 27 adds three new iPhone features I’ve been really loving - 9to5Mac
item.description:
1. iOS 27 adds three new iPhone features I’ve been really loving  9to5Mac
  2. Every new iOS 27 feature that’s worth knowing about  TechCrunch
  3. iOS 27 Wallet App Gets 7 New Features  MacRumors
  4. Apple launches iOS 27 beta 2: Here's what's new  Mashable
  5. I hate AI, but even I can’t wait to try these 10 features on my iPhone  Macworld

item.title: Hands-on: Google Home Speakers are the easiest option for your Google TV Streamer, hands down - 9to5Google
item.description:
1. Hands-on: Google Home Speakers are the easiest option for your Google TV Streamer, hands down  9to5Google
  2. Google’s New Smart Speaker Takes the Lead  WIRED
  3. Google Home Speaker vs. the mainstay Nest Mini: Is this a true upgrade? [Video]  9to5Google

  5. I lived with the new Google Home Speaker for a week — Gemini changed everything  MakeUseOf

item.title: A major Windows 11 upgrade drops July 14 — here’s what’s new for every PC - Windows Central
item.description:
1. A major Windows 11 upgrade drops July 14 — here’s what’s new for every PC  Windows Central
  2. Windows 11 Is About to Change in a Way You'll Actually Notice  PCMag
  3. Microsoft’s July Windows 11 Update Focuses on Fixing Everyday PC Frustrations  TechRepublic
  4. Microsoft is now force-upgrading all Windows 11 home PCs to 25H2  PCWorld
  5. Windows 11 can now turn back the clock when updates go bad  The Register
